proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: Sum[T0, T1], x2: Set[T0], x3: Set[T1]) { Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_set_contains[T0, T1](x2, x3, x1) = x0 ∈ x2 }[T, U](x, Sum.inl[T, U](x), left, right)
function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T1]) { Set.new[Sum[T0, T1]](sum_set_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = sum_set[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[T, U](left, right)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.new[T0](x0) = x0(x1) }[Sum[T, U]](sum_set_contains[T, U](left, right), Sum.inl[T, U](x))
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: Sum[T0, T1], x2: Set[T0], x3: Set[T1]) { Sum.inr[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_set_contains[T0, T1](x2, x3, x1) = x0 ∈ x3 }[T, U](y, Sum.inr[T, U](y), left, right)
function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T1]) { Set.new[Sum[T0, T1]](sum_set_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = sum_set[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[T, U](left, right)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.new[T0](x0) = x0(x1) }[Sum[T, U]](sum_set_contains[T, U](left, right), Sum.inr[T, U](y))
s ∈ sum_set[T, U](left, right) and forall(x0: T) { not x0 ∈ left or f(x0) ∈ left_target }
function(x0: T) { not (x0 ∈ left and not f(x0) ∈ left_target) }(x)

goal: sum_map[T, U, V, W](s, f, g) = Sum.inl[V, W](f(x))
proof: function[T0, T1, T4, T5](x0: T0, x1: Sum[T0, T1], x2: T0 -> T4, x3: T1 -> T5) { Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_map[T0, T1, T4, T5](x1, x2, x3) = Sum.inl[T4, T5](x2(x0)) }[T, U, V, W](x, s, f, g)

goal: sum_set[V, W](left_target, right_target).contains(sum_map[T, U, V, W](s, f, g))

proof: (forall(x0: U) { not x0 ∈ right or g(x0) ∈ right_target } = true)
function(x0: U) { not (x0 ∈ right and not g(x0) ∈ right_target) }(y)

goal: sum_map[T, U, V, W](s, f, g) = Sum.inr[V, W](g(y))
proof: function[T0, T1, T4, T5](x0: T1, x1: Sum[T0, T1], x2: T0 -> T4, x3: T1 -> T5) { Sum.inr[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_map[T0, T1, T4, T5](x1, x2, x3) = Sum.inr[T4, T5](x3(x0)) }[T, U, V, W](y, s, f, g)

goal: sum_set[V, W](left_target, right_target).contains(sum_map[T, U, V, W](s, f, g))
